item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: ❓Lisa Brewer - Domestic Relations Attorneys of Washington
item.description: Lisa Brewer signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Domestic Relations Attorneys of Washington.

item.title: 👍Miryam Gordon - Department of Retirement Systems
item.description: Miryam Gordon signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍💵Catherine West - KCBA
item.description: Catherine West signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent KCBA. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Sandy Garcia - Legal Counsel for Youth and Children
item.description: Sandy Garcia signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Legal Counsel for Youth and Children.

item.title: 👍Mary Pleger - Catholic Charities
item.description: Mary Pleger signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Catholic Charities.

item.description: Janta Steele signed up to testify Pro.

item.title: 👍💵Melanie Smith - WA State Long Term Care Ombuds Progam
item.description: Melanie Smith signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent WA State Long Term Care Ombuds Progam. They are a registered lobbyist.
